question: Where is Active Body Fitness located?

question: What are the chicken starters you serve?
ground_truth: The chicken starters served at Sawan Indian Cuisine include: Andhra Style Chicken Vepudu ($16.99), Chicken 65 ($15.99), Chicken 555 ($16.99), Chicken Pakora ($15.99), Chilli Chicken / Chicken Manchurian ($15.99), and Karivepaku Chicken ($15.99). Goat and Shrimp items are not part of the chicken starter selection.
